input.question: Who are the top 10 highest rated professors based on student evaluations?

payload.question: Who are the top 10 highest rated professors based on student evaluations?

output.sql:
SELECT
  professors.id AS professor_id,
  CONCAT(professors.first_name, ' ', professors.last_name) AS professor_name,
  ROUND(AVG(evaluations.rating), 2) AS average_rating,
  COUNT(evaluations.rating) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors
JOIN evaluations ON evaluations.professor_id = professors.id
GROUP BY professors.id, professors.first_name, professors.last_name
ORDER BY average_rating DESC, evaluation_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.description: Bar chart of the top 10 professors by average student evaluation rating.
visualization.title: Top 10 Highest Rated Professors (by Average Student Evaluation)

payload.sql:
SELECT
  professors.id AS professor_id,
  CONCAT(professors.first_name, ' ', professors.last_name) AS professor_name,
  ROUND(AVG(evaluations.rating), 2) AS average_rating,
  COUNT(evaluations.rating) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors
JOIN evaluations ON evaluations.professor_id = professors.id
GROUP BY professors.id, professors.first_name, professors.last_name
ORDER BY average_rating DESC, evaluation_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
